name: Ranged Combat
description: Enables accurate attacks with bows, crossbows, and thrown weapons against distant foes in the dungeon's gloom.

name: Melee Combat
description: Enables effective close-quarters fighting with swords, axes, maces, and other hand-held weapons against dungeon denizens.

name: Perception
description: Enables detection of hidden enemies, secret doors, ambushes, and subtle environmental changes in the shifting labyrinth.

name: Stealth
description: Enables silent movement through shadowed corridors and the ability to slip past patrolling horrors unnoticed.

name: First Aid
description: Enables emergency medical treatment to stabilize wounds, bandage injuries, and prevent death in the field.

name: Scavenging
description: Enables thorough searching of corpses, rubble, and forgotten corners to salvage useful supplies and forgotten coin.

name: Negotiation
description: Enables bargaining with merchants, hiring retainers, and establishing terms with potential allies in Dusthollow's rough markets.

name: Intimidation
description: Enables extracting information and compliance through threats, menacing presence, and the implicit promise of violence.

name: Charm
description: Enables winning favor, gaining trust, and eliciting generosity from skeptical strangers through warmth and magnetic personality.

name: Bluff
description: Enables convincing others of falsehoods through confident delivery and carefully constructed fabrications.

name: Insight
description: Enables reading hidden motives, detecting lies, and sensing danger behind seemingly friendly faces.

name: Lockpicking
description: Enables opening sealed doors, treasure chests, and ancient mechanisms without keys through manual manipulation.

name: Sleight of Hand
description: Enables pickpocketing, palming small objects, and performing manual tricks without being noticed.

name: Survival
description: Enables finding safe passages through hostile terrain, foraging for edible fungi, and enduring the dungeon's environmental hazards.

name: Crafting
description: Enables creating weapons, armor, tools, and useful items from raw materials gathered during expeditions.

name: Repair
description: Enables restoring damaged equipment, patching armor, and maintaining gear essential for survival in the depths.

name: Acrobatics
description: Enables balancing across crumbling ledges, tumbling past enemies, and landing safely from dangerous falls.

name: Deception
description: Enables misdirection, disguise, and creating false impressions to manipulate how others perceive reality.

name: Dodge
description: Enables evading enemy attacks through quick reflexes and anticipatory movement in combat.

name: Farming/Botany
description: Enables identifying magical and mundane plants, cultivating rare fungi, and recognizing botanical hazards in bioluminescent chambers.

name: Animal Handling
description: Enables calming, directing, and training beasts, from dungeon vermin to the pack animals vital for long expeditions.

name: Trap Detection
description: Enables spotting pressure plates, tripwires, magical sensors, and the Architects' cruel mechanisms before they trigger.

name: Arcane Lore
description: Enables understanding the history of Valdros's magical empire, recognizing mystical phenomena, and comprehending spell theory.

name: Divine Magic
description: Enables channeling sacred power to heal wounds, bless allies, and turn back the undead horrors lurking in the depths.

name: Arcane Magic
description: Enables casting devastating spells, manipulating magical energies, and unleashing the destructive potential of the arcane arts.

name: Item Identification
description: Enables analyzing discovered artifacts to reveal their properties, origins, and potential curses before use.

name: Dungeoneering
description: Enables navigating the labyrinth's shifting architecture, recognizing structural patterns, and anticipating environmental hazards.

name: Cartography
description: Enables creating accurate maps that retain coherence even as the labyrinth attempts to confound recorded paths.

name: Necromancy Resistance
description: Enables shrugging off life-draining effects, resisting possession, and enduring the suffocating aura of undead abominations.

name: Rune Reading
description: Enables deciphering ancient sigils, activating magical wards, and interpreting the binding scripts that empower constructs.

name: Alchemy
description: Enables brewing healing potions, explosive compounds, and transformative elixirs from rare ingredients harvested below.
